summary: Comprehensive testing of CyberVoid Hub massive update completed. All backend APIs tested and working correctly (100% pass rate). Frontend UI verified with all new features displaying correctly. Rate limiting is functioning properly but caused test interruptions during repeated login attempts.
passed_tests: Health check API - /api/health
User registration with validation (username 3-24 chars, password upper+lower+number min 8)
User login with JWT token generation
Forgot Password flow (MOCKED) - returns reset_token and code directly
Password reset with new credentials
File upload with multipart form data
File listing on dashboard
Folder creation, listing, and deletion
File move to folder
File comments - add and list comments
Storage quota endpoint returns used/quota/count/percent
Notification settings - get and update (push, chat, file)
Share link creation and access (no auth required for viewing)
Vault setup and unlock with vault_token
Vault status check
Search functionality for files and users (type: all/files/accounts)
Profile update (display name, bio)
Get user profile by ID
Get current user info /api/auth/me
Chat creation between two users
Send and receive messages
Mark messages as read
Bulk delete files
Google Login button visible on auth page
Forgot password button visible on login page
Dashboard shows folder bar, file stats, grid/list toggle, type filters
Settings page shows storage quota, notification toggles, accent color picker
Chat page shows conversation list, message area, input field, send button
Password strength indicator in registration form
critical_code_review_comments: Rate limiting is correctly implemented but aggressive - may affect legitimate users during testing
All APIs properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
JWT tokens have 30-day expiry which is appropriate for this app type

test_credentials.note: Multiple test users created during testing (test001, test002, testnew003, playwright_test, uitest_*)

seed_data_creation: Created test users, folders, files, chat conversations, comments, and share links during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend rate limiting is active (5 login attempts per email per 5 min, 5 registrations per IP per 5 min). Use fresh users/tokens or wait for cooldown. All features from the massive update are working correctly. The forgot password flow is MOCKED - returns reset code directly in response instead of sending email.

mocked_apis.POST /api/auth/forgot-password: Returns reset_token and 6-digit code directly in response instead of sending email
